doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The EDPB does not issue numbered "Guidance Notes" in this format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such document appears in official EDPB records as of Marc
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue numbered "Guidance Notes" in this format, the reference numbering system is inconsistent with EDPB practice, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such document appears in official EDPB records as of March 2026.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue numbered "Guidance Notes" in this format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such document appears in official EDPB records as of March 2026.
